title: Dark Compass
description: A new compass to help you find dark areas.
body:
## Dark Compass
This mod adds two items, a new compass and a material used to craft it.\
Mob Spawners will now drop a Spawner Fragment when broken.\
This fragment can be combined with an amethyst shard to create a Dark Compass.\
This compass, when used, locks onto the nearest dark patch within a 50 block square radius.\
Useful for finding any hidden patches underneath your base.\

Has support for Compass3D by AdamRaichu.\
Compass3D can be found here:
[https://modrinth.com/mod/compass3d](https://modrinth.com/mod/compass3d)
